title: Business Analysis: Kotlin Coroutines Visualizer Platform
summary: Strategic business plan for a freemium educational platform visualizing Kotlin coroutine execution in real-time, targeting developers, educators, and enterprises.
notes: Manifest declared PRD; document confirms via user stories (Use Cases 1-5), acceptance criteria (KPIs, success metrics), value propositions by segment, and requirements-driven approach (business objectives driving feature specs, roadmap milestones). No frontmatter status field, but content structure matches PRD template (market analysis → value prop → requirements → success metrics).
